stemHtml:
You are flying FL330 and about to enter NAT airspace. You receive the following NAT oceanic clearance from the ATC:

"Speedbird 69 cleared to London Heathrow via Track WHISKEY, cross PILLU FL350, Mach .83, request FL350". Regarding climb from FL330 to FL350 the correct answer is…

options.a: You can start climb after passing PILLU.
options.b: You can commence climb freely anytime before PILLU.
options.c: You must obtain separate clearance from ATC to commence climb.
